libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No special environment or system-property setup is needed. When adapting existing 3.0.16 tests, avoid stale imports from org.codehaus.janino.util.iterator; in 3.1.0 iterator utilities are in the transitive commons-compiler package org.codehaus.commons.compiler.util.iterator.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8855 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.codehaus.janino:janino:3.1.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing tests that directly reference internal utility packages from 3.0.16 may fail to compile because some utilities moved to commons-compiler packages in 3.1.0.
Native-image execution of Janino-generated classes may still need tests to tolerate unsupported dynamic class loading behavior, but that is test logic rather than deterministic setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Janino 3.1.0 is a self-contained in-process Java compiler/evaluator for normal tests; its required commons-compiler library is already a transitive compile dependency of org.codehaus.janino:janino, and no Docker service or environment/system property is required for meaningful coverage.
